calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar May-15-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:44am
Judge Pro Tem Marc Seidenfeld, not reported, clerk J. Kong, Dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Calism Appeal. Appellant appears by Deborah Zwister Lewerke, corporate Customer Care: Respondent Sunil Kilam appears as pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Seidenfeld.
Mr. Kilam questions Ms. Lewerke.

Respondent's exhibits: verious letters
Appellant shows various evidence and submit various exhibits in folder to Judge Seidenfeld.

10:20am
Respondent's exhibits returned and appellant's exhibits in folder retained. Matter is submitted.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Mar-29-2013 Judgment Entered
